zh.lifeSummary: 當John FitzAlan II於1223年5月6日出生在英國英格蘭韋斯特 素可阿盧德爾時，他的父親John FitzAlan I24歲，母親Isabel d'Aubigny28歲。他於1244年與Maud de Verdun結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1267年11月10日享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾。

nameMeanings.name: FitzAlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Anglo-Norman French fiz ‘son’ ( see Fitz ) + the personal name Alan ( see Allen ), ‘son of Alan’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Allen
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Alain, Alein (Old Breton Alan), from a Celtic personal name of great antiquity and obscurity. In England the personal name is now usually spelled Alan, the surname Allen; in Scotland the surname is more often Allan. From 1139 it was common in Scotland, where the surname also derives from Gaelic Ailéne, Ailín, from ail ‘rock’. The present-day frequency of the surname Allen in England and Ireland is partly accounted for by the popularity of the personal name among Breton followers of William the Conqueror, by whom it was imported first to Britain and then to Ireland. Saint Alan(us) was a 5th-century bishop of Quimper, who was a cult figure in medieval Brittany. Another Saint Al(l)an was a Cornish or Breton saint of the 6th century, to whom a church in Cornwall is dedicated.
English: occasionally perhaps from the rare Middle English femaje personal name Aline (Old French Adaline, Aaline), a pet form of ancient Germanic names in Adal-, especially Adalheidis (see Allis ).
French: variant of   Allain  , a cognate of 1 above, and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When John FitzAlan II was born on 6 May 1223, in Arundel, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, John FitzAlan I, was 24 and his mother, Isabel d'Aubigny, was 28. He married Maud de Verdun in 1244. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 10 November 1267, at the age of 44, and was buried in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John FitzAlan II est né le 6 mai 1223, à Arundel, West Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John FitzAlan I, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabel d'Aubigny, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Verdun en 1244. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 novembre 1267, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John FitzAlan II am 6. Mai 1223 in Arundel, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John FitzAlan I 24 und seine Mutter Isabel d'Aubigny 28. Er hat 1244 Maud de Verdun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. November 1267 im Alter von 44 Jahren und wurde in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Maud de Verdun nel 1244. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 novembre 1267, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John FitzAlan IIが1223年5月6日にイギリスイギリスウエスト スセックスアルンデルで生まれた時，父John FitzAlan Iは24歳，母Isabel d'Aubignyは28歳であった。1244年にMaud de Verdunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1267年11月10日に44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John FitzAlan II(이)가 1223년 5월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 아런들에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John FitzAlan I(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel d'Aubigny(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1244년 Maud de Verdun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1267년 11월 10일 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John FitzAlan II nasceu em 6 de maio de 1223, em Arundel, West Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John FitzAlan I, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isabel d'Aubigny, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Verdun em 1244. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de novembro de 1267, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John FitzAlan II родился 6 мая 1223 г. в местности арундель, вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John FitzAlan I было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel d'Aubigny, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Verdun в 1244 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 ноября 1267 г. в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.
